creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This was an intentional change and will remain this way until 
such time as the various contents stabilize a bit more.  There is 
a delay from the time that artwork is sent off to the time the CD  
is actually made (due to various lead times) and last-minute changes 
to the contents only invalidate the labels, causing even MORE confusion.
